title: juncus odoratus
intro: Juncus odoratus, also known as Fragrant Rush or Sweet Rush, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Juncaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing congestion and coughing, as well as soothing irritated mucous membranes. Herbal preparations of Juncus odoratus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and topical applications for skin issues.
